title: Subito.it Scraper
description: Collect listings from Subito.it using direct API requests. Use either a Subito URL or keyword/location.

startUrl.title: URL
startUrl.description: A Subito listing URL, for example https://www.subito.it/annunci-italia/vendita/usato/

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword used when URL has no query term.

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional location text merged into the keyword search.

results_wanted.title: Results wanted
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of records to save.

max_pages.title: Max pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of API pages to fetch.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy for stable production runs.
